# Nifty & Sensex Market Outlook - Projections for 2026

## Nifty & Sensex Market Outlook — Projections for 2026

Indian equity benchmarks expected to rise on improving fundamentals

Indian equity markets are projected to maintain an upward trajectory through 2026, with several brokerage houses forecasting the Nifty 50 to reach the range of 29,000–32,000 by December 2026. ## RBI Policy February 2026 – Key Rates and Measures

Yash Paul Bhola 07 Feb 2026 2,376 Views 0 comment Fema / RBI | Articles

In its February 2026 monetary policy, the RBI maintained a status quo on interest rates, keeping the repo rate unchanged at 5.25% and continuing with a neutral policy stance.
